text: The biennial review of assessments of the published determinations of atomic weights and other relevant data has led to revisions of the standard atomic weights for five of the elements. For bromine, germanium, indium, magnesium and mercury the revised standard atomic weights are 79.901–79.907, 72.630(8), 114.818(1), 24.304–24.307 and 200.592(3) respectively. For bromine and magnesium the intervals assigned to their revised standard atomic weights are in line with the common occurrence of small differences in the atomic weights of these elements as compared in samples of normal terrestrial origin.
